allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const txt = fs.readFileSync\('src/data/countries.ts','utf8'\); const matches = txt.match\(/code: '[A-Z]{2}'/g\); console.log\('Total entries:', matches?.length\); const unique = new Set\(matches?.map\(m=>m.slice\(7,9\)\)\); console.log\('Unique countries:', unique.size\);")
